comments.comment: met reporting thresholds;

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
This facility (11-16) is reporting NOx and CO emissions for 2014. This facility reported NOx emissions thresholds in 2013. The following changes occurred from 2013 to 2014, respectively:
1) NOx emissions increased by 373%
2) CO emissions increased by 368%
Potential sources of these differences are:
1) Added the following equipment during 2013, which only operated for part of the year: 16 heaters, two (2) boilers, two (2) 1,480 hp Waukesha compressor engines and one (1) 530 hp Waukesha generator engine. This equipment operated for the full year in 2014.
2) Installed the following equipment during 2014: two (2) 1,480 hp Waukesha compressor engines, one (1) new dehydrator boiler, 10 new heaters.
3) Increase in production for 2014.

comments.comment:
This facility (11-16) is reporting NOx and CO emissions for 2014. This facility reported NOx emissions thresholds in 2013. The following changes occurred from 2013 to 2014, respectively:
1) NOx emissions increased by 373%
2) CO emissions increased by 368%
Potential sources of these differences are:
1) Added the following equipment during 2013, which only operated for part of the year: 16 heaters, two (2) boilers, two (2) 1,480 hp Waukesha compressor engines and one (1) 530 hp Waukesha generator engine. This equipment operated for the full year in 2014.
2) Installed the following equipment during 2014: two (2) 1,480 hp Waukesha compressor engines, one (1) new dehydrator boiler, 10 new heaters.
3) Increase in production for 2014.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
The NOx emissions calculations have been reviewed for 2020. We confirm that the reported quantities calculated based on the 2020 Petrinex data as well as equipment specs and operating hours provided by Tourmaline are correct.
Emissions factors were taken from either engine manufacturer’s specification sheets, engine tests, or published documents by Clearstone Engineering Ltd.
